title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with LIC! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
